title: One Punch Man
description: A datapack that allows players to transform into saitama from one punch man.
body:
In this Datapack you can transorm into Saitama from One Punch Man.

To get his powers run the command "/function opm:get_saitama" in the chat.

There are many different attacks that you can select by scrolling in your hotbar.

If you no longer want to have the powers of saitama just write “/function opm:get_normal” in the chat.


I don't want to spoil too much so try it out yourself.
